global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with abstract shapes and clear text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book a trip with special fares.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes in the center, including an oval and a square, with a soft orange hue.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: Another abstract shape in the center, slightly overlapping with others, maintaining a warm color palette.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape in the center, contributing to the overall decorative theme.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: An elongated oval shape positioned centrally, adding to the visual interest.

elements.label: Center decorative shapes
elements.description: A larger abstract shape in the center, enhancing the composition with its size.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element at the top, possibly a logo or icon, in a light color.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape at the bottom, adding to the overall design.

elements.label: Bottom decorative element
elements.description: Another small circular shape at the bottom, complementing the previous element.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape in the center, contributing to the abstract theme.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'HorizonHop UGC' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Promotional message
elements.description: Text at the bottom stating 'Book your next trip Special fares today' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free' encouraging user interaction.
